stage.purpose: reviewed candidate-114 32GB low-memory deterministic 120-second Beam Search

weapon.notes: Weapon base ATK and crit stat are assumed already reflected in user-entered real stat profile. Runtime weapon passive effects are applied separately.

trailblazing_star.notes: 2-set Fusion DMG is already manually reflected in this build profile. 5-set is implemented as a runtime buff triggered by emitted fusion_burst or tune_rupture_shifting mechanic events.

weapon.notes: Static Mist base ATK, crit rate, and ER are already reflected in profile; only Outro incoming ATK buff is runtime.

pact_of_neonlight_leap.notes: 2pc Spectro +10% and user-entered damage bonuses are profile-reflected. 5pc incoming ATK buff is runtime.

weapon.notes: Discord R5 is equipped. Discord's 412.5 base ATK is included in stat_components.atk.weapon_base for ATK-scaling actions such as Reactor Husk. Discord's 51.8% Energy Regen substat remains included in combat_stats.energy_regen, and its cooldown-gated Concerto restore is applied at runtime. No Starfield Calibrator DEF passive or party Crit DMG buff is included in this profile.

halo_of_starry_radiance.notes: 2-set Healing Bonus is metadata only for DPS. 5-set party ATK buff uses current Off-Tune Buildup Rate. Base value is 1.0; Syntony Field can raise it by +0.5, and C2 can add +0.2 if enabled.

verified_bc.selection_reason: historical verified BC reference; not the current v114 project incumbent

route_replay_summaries.aemeath_seraphic_duet_followup_source_mu: Source multiplier remains 1.0935 when present; 1.531 / 1.5309 is not hardcoded as the coefficient.
route_replay_summaries.aemeath_forte_interfered_amp_note: Interfered Marker is reported as damage-taken amp and is not part of the 1.0935 source multiplier.
route_replay_summaries.legacy_damage_by_source_action_category_: Backward-compatible source action category totals include generated mechanic damage attached to the source action.

historical_verified_bc_reference.selection_reason: historical verified BC reference; not the current v114 project incumbent

project_comparison_incumbent.selection_reason: reviewed v114 comparison incumbent retained unless a completed 120s Beam route exceeds its damage
